## Summary

<!-- Describe the purpose and scope of this change. -->

## Change type

- [ ] Runbook or procedure
- [ ] Framework mapping
- [ ] Diagram or visual documentation
- [ ] Query, command, or script
- [ ] Automation or infrastructure
- [ ] Maintenance or correction

## Validation

- [ ] I reviewed all changed Markdown and internal links.
- [ ] I verified Mermaid diagrams render correctly where applicable.
- [ ] I checked commands and examples for placeholders and safe defaults.
- [ ] I used authoritative references for technical claims.
- [ ] I distinguished observed evidence from assumptions and hypotheses.
- [ ] I did not include credentials, account IDs, customer data, or active incident details.
- [ ] I updated navigation, the changelog, and release notes when required.

## Operational safety

- [ ] Changes avoid presenting destructive actions without authorization, evidence-preservation, validation, and rollback guidance.
- [ ] ATT&CK mappings are described as technique context unless supported by explicit evidence.
- [ ] Examples are intended for dedicated lab environments or authorized operations.

## Breaking changes

None, unless described below.
